svg.title: UACP Spring Boot + Spring AI Architecture on Azure
svg.desc: End-to-end architecture: client layer, Spring Boot API Gateway, input routing, AI model layer, output transformation, session persistence in MongoDB, and Azure managed services

g.text: Auth · Rate limit · Session init · SSE/WebFlux
Routes by: input type · output type · disability profile · latency SLA
voice · text · sign · haptic · symbol — streamed via SSE
